mapper.sql: SELECT id, user_id, order_id, min_num, max_num, duration, custom_price, group_status, current_num, server_ip, server_account, server_password, server_start_time, server_expire_time, initiate_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time, delete_flag FROM osh_group_user_initiated
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_group_user_initiated ( user_id, activity_id, order_id, min_num, max_num, duration, custom_price, group_status, current_num, initiate_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{activityId}, #{orderId}, #{minNum}, #{maxNum}, #{duration}, #{customPrice}, #{groupStatus}, #{currentNum}, #{initiateTime}, #{expireTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_group_user_initiated SET current_num = #{currentNum}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE osh_group_user_initiated SET group_status = #{groupStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS leaderUserId, min_num, max_num, current_num, group_status, duration, custom_price, expire_time FROM osh_group_user_initiated WHERE id = #{activityId} AND delete_flag = 0
